office_address: 3200 West Colonial Drive, Suite 250, Orlando, FL 32808
emergency_definition: active bee or wasp swarm inside a structure
bed bug infestation in a hotel or short-term rental

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_action: promise a callback within 1 hour and take a full message

non_emergency_routing_rules: Voicemail. Callbacks next business morning. Saturday afternoon calls get returned Monday.

call_transfer_rules.fail_action: take a full message and promise a callback within 2 hours

integration_constraints: never schedule a termite treatment job without first confirming a termite inspection has been completed and logged in PestPac
never create a mosquito treatment job between November and March
all bed bug jobs require a pre-inspection to be booked first
after_hours_flow_summary: Non-emergency after-hours calls go to voicemail and get returned the next business morning. Saturday afternoon calls get returned Monday.
office_hours_flow_summary: Collect name, number, address, and type of pest issue, then transfer to scheduling team. Emergency situations get same-day response. Ask if current customer or first-time caller.
special_instructions: always ask if the property is residential or commercial
never promise a specific treatment method on the phone
mention Guardian Shield annual protection plan at the end of every residential call
